title: Debug D1
excerpt: description: Capture exceptions and log error messages returned from D1 database queries. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/d1/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. D1 allows you to capture exceptions and log errors returned when querying a database. To debug D1, you will use the same tools available when [debugging Workers](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/observability/).…
